name: NetworkChuck
oneLine: High-energy IT educator selling networking, Linux, and homelab tutorials with a coffee-and-hacking brand.
bio: Chuck Keith is a Dallas-Fort-Worth-based IT educator who launched NetworkChuck on April 27, 2014. The channel (5M+ subscribers) covers practical networking (CCNA, Cisco IOS), Linux fundamentals, cybersecurity, and Raspberry Pi homelab projects, all delivered with an over-the-top excited presenting style anchored by his coffee-shop aesthetic. He runs adjacent businesses including NetworkChuck Coffee and NetworkChuck Academy (paid courses) and the noobs podcast.
style: Highly-edited 10-25 minute studio-shot tutorials with multi-camera cuts, sound effects, and his trademark coffee opener.
